main.title: openclaw tool box
main.chose: Are you sure you want to uninstall openclaw (y/n):
main.back_main_menu: Press B key to back to the menu.
main.tips: Use the up and down arrow keys to navigate, press Enter to select.(Note: This tool requires ASCII escape characters.)

about_context: Introduction: This tool is designed for beginners who are not familiar with the console,
making it easier and simpler for everyone to use OpenClaw.
I've replaced commands with simple options, making it easy to understand.
setting.back_setting_menu: Press B key to back to the menu.
setting.title: openclaw tool box setting
